title: Author a stream(:clear_all, reset: true) pattern
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/clearable_list_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ClearableListLive). It must: (1) initialize stream(:items, initial) in mount, (2) handle_event("clear", _, socket) calls stream(socket, :items, [], reset: true) — the reset: true flag is required to clear all DOM children, (3) handle_event("add", %{"name" => name}, socket) stream_inserts a new item. Render <div id="items" phx-update="stream"> with :for iteration. The reset: true on clear is the key point.
tier_rationale: reset: true on stream is a specific required flag. Non-obvious.
